data.current_description: Get the list of Categories that can be used to filter podcasts in the search podcasts request
data.summary_suggestion: Retrieve available podcast categories for filtering
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves the complete list of podcast categories available for filtering and searching podcasts. Returns an array of category objects that can be used as filter parameters in podcast search operations. No authentication required. Useful for populating category selection interfaces or validating category filters before performing searches.
data.reasoning: Original operation lacks a summary entirely and the description is incomplete. The description mentions the purpose but doesn't clarify what is returned, authentication requirements, or how an AI agent should use this data. Added summary for quick operation identification, expanded description to include return value details, authentication status, and practical use cases for AI agent decision-making.

data.current_description: Get the list of Languages that can be used to filter stations in the search stations request
data.summary_suggestion: Retrieve available languages for station filtering
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves the complete list of supported languages available for filtering stations in station search operations. Returns an array of Language objects that can be used as filter parameters in the searchStations endpoint.
data.reasoning: Missing summary entirely. Description lacks clarity about what is returned (Language objects) and how to use the response. Added explicit mention of return type and use case for AI agent clarity.
